title: nepeta nepetella subsp. mallophora
intro: Nepeta nepetella subsp. mallophora, also known as catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Nepeta nepetella subsp. mallophora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in herbalism for its versatility and effectiveness.
